## ⚡ Quick Status
```dataviewjs
const today = dv.date("<% tp.date.now('YYYY-MM-DD') %>");
dv.table(
  ["Project", "Status", "Priority", "Next Action"],
  dv.pages('"projects"')
    .where(p => p.status === "active")
    .sort(p => p.priority, 'desc')
    .map(p => [p.file.link, p.status, p.priority, p['next-action'] || "—"])
);
```
